character_buff.name: Menesis
character_buff.description: Intake holy aura into ones body to enhanced punching strength/nApplies [Inulnerable] upon successful hit against target with [Squashed Armor] Lv. 3

effects: Duration: 300 seconds
DEF +20
IMM +20
Ignores all damage except from normal attacks
Applies [Deviated Grace] upon successful skill hit
Monster ATK +300%
PEN +20
Normal Attack Damage increases in proportion to [INT]
[PvE Maps] The sanctuary will follow Hildegard
[PvP Maps] The sanctuary disappears when Hildegard is more than 12m away from it

stances.name: Clabuster

skills.name: Spin Uriela
skills.description: Comes closer to the target to strike its weakness and then throws it into the air.
skills.target: 3 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

effects: Ignores enemys DEF by 50
Enemys [Squashed Armor]s Lv. +1 with a successful hit
Your [Sages Teaching]s Lv. +1 with a successful hit
Extra ignores enemy PCs DEF in proportion to [Squashed Armor]s Lv. and additional [INT]
Increases Monster Damage in proportion to [Squashed Armor]s Lv. and additional [INT]
Once [Squashed Armor]s Lv. is 3, a successful hit will lift it
